positive: A stylized, symmetrical illustration of a whimsical celestial creature, blending elements of an owl and a crescent moon. The creature should have feathered texture and large, luminous eyes, set against a deep indigo and teal gradient nebula background. Focus on intricate line art, clean silhouette, and bioluminescent glow effects. Central composition, designed for repeat tiling on apparel. Hyper-detailed, vector graphic style, flat color blocking with gradient highlights, cinematic dramatic lighting. Aspect ratio optimized for square placement. High contrast, clean vector art.
